Vue event modifiers prevent vs. stop

.prevent or event.preventDefault() – It stops the browsers default behaviour (A example is reload when you hit in ) .stop or event.stopPropagation() – It prevents the event from propagating (or “bubbling up”) the DOM .once - The event will be triggered at most once
